name: Phyllotaxis Galaxy Spiral
description: Golden-angle phyllotaxis spiral where each floret is a star in a galaxy. Vogel's formula arranges hundreds of stars with Hubble palette colors, Lin-Shu density waves, 3D perspective projection, and depth-of-field Gaussian rendering.

params.name: Star Spread
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Star Size
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Disk Rotation
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Wave Density
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
